messages.content: You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
Kya paddy ke khete mein mathia ko khatam karne ki koi aasani wali aam tarika hai?

Haan, mathia ko khatam karne ke liye aap pre-emergence herbicides ka istemal karein. 3 din baad transplant karne ke baad Pretilachlor 50% EC 600 ml/acre ya Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP 60 gm/acre ka istemal karein. Agar mathia daud raha hai to Bispyribac sodium 10% SC 100 ml/acre 20-25 din baad istemal karein. Hath se khatme bhi karna hota hai 20-25 aur 40-45 din baad. Herbiside ka istemal karne time 2-3 inch pani rakhna hota hai.
Herbiside ka kis tarah istemal karna hota hai?
Herbiside ka istemal karne time 2-3 inch pani rakhna hota hai.
Pretilachlor 50% EC ka kitna dosha istemal karna hota hai?
Pretilachlor 50% EC ka istemal 600 ml/acre karne ka sara hai.
Kab tak herbiside ka istemal karna chahiye?
3 din baad transplant karne ke baad Pretilachlor 50% EC ya Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP ka istemal karein. Agar mathia daud raha hai to Bispyribac sodium 10% SC 20-25 din baad istemal karein.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
Is it okay to use Nirog on my wheat seeds to keep them healthy?

Yes, you can use Nirog on your wheat seeds. It's a bio-fungicide with Trichoderma viride. For loose smut, mix 4 grams of it per kg of seeds. Make sure the seeds are coated well and dry them in the shade before sowing. Always check the label to make sure it's registered and buy from a trusted dealer.
When should Nirog be applied during the wheat crop cycle?
Nirog should be applied before sowing by mixing 4 grams per kg of seeds, coating them well, and drying in the shade prior to sowing.
How much Nirog should I use per kg of seeds?
For loose smut, mix 4 grams of it per kg of seeds.
How to apply Nirog on wheat seeds?
Mix 4 grams of Nirog per kg of seeds, coat the seeds well, and dry them in the shade before sowing.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
My wheat plants are getting weak and dying, what could be the problem?

It might be termites. They attack the roots and make plants easy to pull out. Yellow leaves and stunted growth are signs. To manage them, treat seeds with Chlorpyriphos or thiomethoxam. Use Beauveria bassiana in the soil. Keep fields clean and avoid too much organic matter. Apply Chlorpyrifos with water if needed. Stay alert, especially in October and February.
How to apply Chlorpyrifos?
Apply Chlorpyrifos with water if needed.
Kab tak Chlorpyrifos apply karna chahiye?
October aur February mein chinta rakhna chahiye.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
I heard about a product called Nirog for treating my wheat seeds. Is it safe to use?

Yes, you can use Nirog for treating wheat seeds, but it's a bio-fungicide with Trichoderma viride 1.5% WP. For loose smut, use 4 grams per kg of seeds. Mix it well, shade dry, and then sow. Always check the label for active ingredients and make sure it's registered. Buy from authorized dealers and check the batch number.
Nirog kya kharap kharab seed ke liye effective hai?

Yes, you can use Nirog for treating wheat seeds, but it's a bio-fungicide with Trichoderma viride 1.5% WP. For loose smut, use 4 grams per kg of seeds. Mix it well, shade dry, and then sow. Always check the label for active ingredients and make sure it's registered. Buy from authorized dealers and check the batch number.
Kya Nirog ko kis waqt lagana chahiye?
Nirog को बीज के साथ मिलाकर छाया में सुखाकर बोएं। इसे बोने से पहले लागू करें और लेबल पर दिए गए निर्देशों का पालन करें।
Nirog me kya active ingredients hain?
Nirog ek bio-fungicide hai jisme Trichoderma viride 1.5% WP hota hai.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
Can I use Nirog to treat my wheat seeds?

Yes, you can treat wheat seeds with Nirog. It's a bio-fungicide with Trichoderma viride. For loose smut, use 4 grams per kg of seeds. Mix well, dry in shade, and sow. Also, check the label to make sure it's registered. Buy from authorized dealers and use the right dose.
What precautions should I take while using Nirog?
Check the label to make sure it's registered. Buy from authorized dealers and use the right dose.
What are the specific ingredients in Nirog?
Nirog is a bio-fungicide containing Trichoderma viride.
Is Nirog registered?
Check the label to make sure it's registered.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
My paddy field has a lot of wild onion, what can I do about it?

You can control wild onion in your paddy by using herbicides. Apply Pretilachlor 50% EC at 600 ml per acre or Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP at 60 gm per acre within 3 days after transplanting. For later control, use Bispyribac sodium 10% SC at 100 ml per acre at 20-25 days after transplanting. Also, hand weeding at 20-25 and 40-45 days after transplanting works well. Keep 2-3 inches of water in the field when applying the chemicals.
How many times should I apply the herbicides?

You should apply Pretilachlor 50% EC or Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP once within 3 days after transplanting, and Bispyribac sodium 10% SC once at 20-25 days after transplanting. Hand weeding is done twice, at 20-25 and 40-45 days after transplanting.
How much water should be kept in the field while applying the herbicides?
Keep 2-3 inches of water in the field when applying the chemicals.
What are the exact timings for each herbicide application?
Apply Pretilachlor 50% EC or Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP within 3 days after transplanting, and Bispyribac sodium 10% SC at 20-25 days after transplanting.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
Is Nirog a good option to use on my wheat seeds?

Nirog is a bio-fungicide that contains Trichoderma viride 1.5% WP. It can be used for treating wheat seeds, but you need to make sure it's registered by the Central Insecticides Board. Always check the label for the active ingredients and follow the recommended dosage. If you're not sure, ask your local dealer for help.
Kis tarah Nirog ka prayog wheat ke bhijan par karna chahiye?

Nirog ek biyajan itna hai jo Trichoderma viride 1.5% WP ko contain karta hai. Aap wheat ke bhijan ke liye iska prayog kar sakte hain, lekin aapko Central Insecticides Board dvara uska pramān hone ka dhyan rakhna chahiye. Label par aktif anupāt ko check karein aur prasiddh dosha ko follow karein. Agar aapke paas shak hai, to aap apne koi local dealer se madad lena chahiye.
Kitni dosha ka prayog karna chahiye?
Nirog ka prayog karte samay label par likhe aktif anupaat ko dhyan se dekhein aur prasiddh dosha ko follow karein. Agar aapke paas shak hai, to aap apne koi local dealer se madad lena chahiye.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
My wheat plants are looking weak and some are drying up, what's going on?

It sounds like termites might be the problem. They attack the roots and lower stems of wheat plants, causing yellowing, stunted growth, and plants that pull out easily. You can try treating the seeds before sowing with Chlorpyriphos 20% EC or thiomethoxam 30% FS. Also, make sure to keep the field clean and use well-decomposed manure. If the problem is already there, you can use Chlorpyrifos 20% EC with irrigation water. Be careful when using chemicals and follow the instructions closely.
Kab tak Chlorpyrifos 20% EC ka istemal karna chaheye?
Chlorpyrifos 20% EC ka istemal pahle seed chawal ke sowing ke samay ya jab sas ke problem pahle se hai to irrigation ke sath karna chahiye.
Chlorpyrifos 20% EC ka kya istemal karna chahiye?
Chlorpyrifos 20% EC ko irrigation ke sath istemal karna chahiye.
Chlorpyrifos 20% EC ka kya dosha hota hai?
Chlorpyrifos 20% EC ka dosha product ke instructions ke anusaar hona chahiye.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
My wheat plants are not growing well, and some are getting pulled out easily. What could be the problem?

It might be termite damage. Termites attack the roots and lower stem of wheat plants, causing them to dry up and be easily pulled out. This happens more in fields with lots of organic matter or near trees. To manage it, you can use chlorpyrifos or thiomethoxam for seed treatment, apply biopesticides like Beauveria bassiana, and keep the field clean by removing stubble and debris. Also, make sure to irrigate properly and avoid using fresh organic matter.
What is the correct dosage for chlorpyrifos or thiomethoxam when treating wheat seeds?

The exact dosage for chlorpyrifos or thiomethoxam should follow the manufacturer's guidelines on the product label. Always adhere to recommended rates to ensure effective control without harming the crop.
How should I apply chlorpyrifos or thiomethoxam to the wheat seeds?

Chlorpyrifos or thiomethoxam should be used for seed treatment as per the manufacturer's guidelines on the product label. Always adhere to recommended rates to ensure effective control without harming the crop.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
My paddy fields are getting damaged by some bugs. What can I do?

The bugs are called Gundhi Bugs. They suck sap from the rice grains, making them shriveled and lighter. You can use insecticides like Malathion or Imidacloprid. Apply them in the early morning or late evening. You can also use neem extract. Wear gloves and a mask when spraying. Keep your fields clean and remove weeds. Don't spray during flowering or when it's windy.
How should I apply the insecticides?
You can spray them in the early morning or late evening.
What preventive measures can I take?
Keep your fields clean and remove weeds.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
My paddy field has wild onions, how do I get rid of them?

You can control wild onions in paddy by using herbicides. Apply Pretilachlor 50% EC at 600 ml per acre or Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP at 60 grams per acre within 3 days of transplanting. For later stages, use Bispyribac sodium 10% SC at 100 ml per acre at 20-25 days after transplanting. Also, hand weed the field at 20-25 and 40-45 days. Keep 2-3 inches of water in the field when applying chemicals.
How many times should I apply the herbicides?

Apply Pretilachlor 50% EC or Pyrazosulfuron ethyl 10% WP once within 3 days of transplanting, and Bispyribac sodium 10% SC once at 20-25 days after transplanting. Hand weed the field at 20-25 and 40-45 days.
Kab tak paani rakhna chahiye chemicals lagane ke baad?
Chemicals lagane ke samay khepta me 2-3 inch paani rakhna chahiye.
You are a helpful and knowledgeable agricultural advisory assistant.
Is Nirog a good option for treating my wheat seeds?

Yes, Nirog is a biological fungicide that contains Trichoderma viride 1.5% WP. It helps protect wheat seeds from diseases like loose smut and seedling blights. But make sure to check the label for active ingredients and follow the dosage instructions. Always buy genuine products from authorized dealers and check the manufacturing date.
How often should I apply Nirog to my wheat seeds?
Follow the dosage instructions mentioned on the label for application frequency.
What is the recommended dosage for Nirog?
Follow the dosage instructions mentioned on the label.
How to apply Nirog to wheat seeds?
Follow the dosage instructions mentioned on the label.
